activities.name: Can there be too many larches?
Running with my sweetie, after a wonderful anniversary dinner
Walking the hills on a foggy morning
Smooth and easy til it wasn’t
Strolling through the big trees with Chris
I’ll meet you on the other side
Gedye family on the Blaine St stairs
Autumn leaves of Woodland Park and Phinney, with Grace!
Haven’t run at work for almost 8 months
Sergiy’s loop with Anita and Mintu
Pace ladder on my home hill
New shoes on a sparkling fall day
